summary: Meta releases Llama 2, a family of open-weights LLMs from 7B to 70B parameters, including Llama 2-Chat fine-tuned for dialogue, which outperforms open-source chat models and may substitute closed-source models, with safety improvements detailed for community use.

blocks.content: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models

source_span.quote: Llama 2: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models

blocks.content: In this work, we develop and release Llama 2, a collection of pretrained and fine-tuned large language models (LLMs) ranging in scale from 7 billion to 70 billion parameters.

source_span.quote: In this work, we develop and release Llama 2, a collection of pretrained and fine-tuned large language models (LLMs) ranging in scale from 7 billion to 70 billion parameters.

blocks.content: Our models outperform open-source chat models on most benchmarks we tested, and based on our human evaluations for helpfulness and safety, may be a suitable substitute for closed-source models.

source_span.quote: Our models outperform open-source chat models on most benchmarks we tested, and based on our human evaluations for helpfulness and safety, may be a suitable substitute for closed-source models.

blocks.content: Our fine-tuned LLMs, called Llama 2-Chat, are optimized for dialogue use cases.

source_span.quote: Our fine-tuned LLMs, called Llama 2-Chat, are optimized for dialogue use cases.

blocks.content: We provide a detailed description of our approach to fine-tuning and safety improvements of Llama 2-Chat in order to enable the community to build on our work and contribute to the responsible development of LLMs.

source_span.quote: We provide a detailed description of our approach to fine-tuning and safety improvements of Llama 2-Chat in order to enable the community to build on our work and contribute to the responsible development of LLMs.
